name: Wooden Alphabet & Number Puzzles - 2pk - Gigglescape™: Toddler Educational Toy, ABC & Number Learning, Ages 2+
description:
These Wooden Alphabet & Number Puzzles from Gigglescape™ help your little one become comfortable with letters and numbers. Made from wooden material, this set includes two puzzle boards with ten number pieces and 26 letter pieces to challenge their fine motor and problem solving skills. Plus, there are illustrations hidden beneath each puzzle piece to create fun moments with letters and numbers.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
